title: Epigram.
content:
What news to-day?--"Oh! worse and worse--
    "Mac[1] is the Prince's Privy Purse!"--
    The Prince's Purse! no, no, you fool,
    You mean the Prince's Ridicule.
meaning:
Thomas Moore's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epigram."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
